requirement_topic.en: GSO electrical safety and TRA EMC/radio approval context
requirement_topic.zh: GSO电气安全与TRA电磁兼容/无线审批
requirement_topic.zht: GSO電氣安全與TRA電磁相容／無線審批

summary.en: UAE adopts Gulf Standardization Organization bases for heat-pump product safety, with GSO references aligned to IEC EN family standards such as IEC 60335-2-40. Safety evidence should cover product classes and protective features, while TRA applies to radio, wireless, or EMC-capable modules that require UAE market type-approval pathways. MOIAT may apply in industrial-use scenarios and should be assessed by use case.
summary.zh: 阿联酋采用GSO标准体系进行热泵安全管理，参照IEC 60335-2-40等IEC EN族标准。安全文件应覆盖产品类别与保护特性；含无线或具EMC模块的设备需按TRA进行类型核准路径，工业用途场景还需结合MOIAT要求评估。
summary.zht: 阿聯酋採用GSO標準體系進行熱泵安全管理，參照IEC 60335-2-40等IEC EN族標準。安全文件應覆蓋產品類別與保護特性；含無線或具EMC模組的設備需按TRA進行類型核准路徑，工業用途場景還需結合MOIAT要求評估。

standards_or_laws: GSO safety references aligned with IEC EN 60335-2-40
TELECOMMUNICATIONS REGULATORY AUTHORITY (TRA) EMC and wireless approval framework
MOIAT industrial application rules where applicable

summary.en: China uses GB safety and EMC baselines such as GB 4706.32, GB 4343.1, and related GSO-aligned national documents, with CCC as domestic market evidence for relevant categories. These rules are not self-executing in UAE and do not replace GSO-TRA safety, EMC, and radio-type review expectations.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 4706.32、GB 4343.1及相关国家标准支撑电气与EMC安全并配套CCC，但该体系不在阿联酋自动转移，不能替代GSO、TRA对安全、EMC和无线类型审批的要求。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 4706.32、GB 4343.1及相關國家標準支撐電氣與EMC安全並配套CCC，但該體系不在阿聯酋自動轉移，不能替代GSO、TRA對安全、EMC和無線類型審批的要求。

gap.en: Chinese safety and EMC reports may support technical assessment but generally require UAE mapping to GSO IEC-aligned clauses and TRA-facing declarations for active RF/communication functions. Without this mapping, safety and EMC/EMF compliance evidence is usually incomplete for UAE import readiness.
gap.zh: 中国的安全和EMC报告可用于技术评估，但通常需要映射到GSO IEC对齐条款，并对含射频或通信功能提供TRA声明。缺少映射时，阿联酋进口就绪状态下的安全与EMC证据通常不完整。
gap.zht: 中國的安全和EMC報告可用於技術評估，但通常需要映射到GSO IEC對齊條款，並對含射頻或通信功能提供TRA聲明。缺少映射時，阿聯酋進口就緒狀態下的安全與EMC證據通常不完整。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where product scope and utility/industrial deployment require GSO and TRA compliance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where CN applies to CN market categories, but not equivalent to UAE requirement stack

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — GSO IEC-based safety mapping and TRA type-approval expectations remain required for relevant models even when CN GB safety reports already exist.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——即使有中国GB安全报告，相关型号仍需按GSO IEC基础和TRA型式审核要求完成阿联酋映射。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——即使有中國GB安全報告，相關型號仍需按GSO IEC基礎和TRA型式審核要求完成阿聯酋映射。
